occupation_definition: Teach occupational, vocational, career, or technical subjects to students at the secondary school level. Excludes “Special Education Teachers” (25-2050), and “Substitute Teachers, Short-Term” (25-3031).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Preschool, Elementary, Middle, Secondary, and Special Education Teachers

siblings.occupation_title: Secondary School Teachers, Except Special and Career/Technical Education
